page.title: Agent-Native Mail
page.description: Agent-Native Mail Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

blocks.title: Agent-Native Mail
blocks.summary: Agent-Native Mail Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

stateFixtures.longContent: The Agent-Native Studio pack keeps every public template app installable as one graph while the actual React apps run through the Agent-Native gateway and Harness owns governance.
stateFixtures.empty: No records are loaded in the local aggregate Studio pack; install the workspace graph or open the Agent-Native gateway to run the actual apps.
stateFixtures.error: A template app reports display-only status here until its live Agent-Native route or Harness-governed action is opened.
